MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-13-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING AUG-13-2019 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE IN LIGHT OF THE HISTORY OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHARMA, NARENDRA
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST NARENDRA SHARMA FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-11-2019, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-26-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CIVIL RIGHTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHARMA, NARENDRA AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, VIMLABEN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-03-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-30-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-10-2018

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective in light of the history of failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. All previously imposed sanctions against the plaintiff are vacated. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2019 Continued To Aug-13-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Aug-13-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2019 Continued To Jun-11-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Narendra Sharma, plaintiff appearing on her own behalf. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Jun-11-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2018 Continued To Feb-05-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-06-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
